make cakes sweeter more edible, people started heavily flavoring cakes with molasses.

will know used yogurt.

large bowl, combine flour, baking powder, coconut sugar, ginger, cinnamon, cloves.

Gently molasses, yogurt, milk.
Once mixture comes together, turn dough onto floured work surface gently knead using your hands until dough comes together.
Form dough into large circle about 1-inch deep.
circle into equal slices.
Place slices prepared baking sheet bake minutes, until lightly browned outside.
toothpick inserted into center scone should come clean.
Meanwhile, make drizzle whisking together remaining tablespoon Greek yogurt, maple syrup, vanilla extract small bowl.
Transfer mixture pastry bag.
Allow scones cool minutes before drizzling glaze over scones.

Global Sleeping Aids Market size projected valued Billion 2024; with CAGR 6.2% from 2017 2025.
Sleeping aids medical specialty subspecialty devoted diagnosis therapy sleep disturbances disorders which caused factors such psychiatric disorders (Depression, insomnia anxiety), medical issues (asthma), environmental problems (light, noise, temperature etc.)
others.
These sleep disorders lead number chronic diseases, such high diabetes, arthritis, blood pressure, stroke.
people aware these disorders trying treat diagnose these disorders early stage soon possible.
Rise demand sleeping pills, changing consumer lifestyle, increase geriatric obese population, increasing disposable income factors propelling growth global sleeping aids market.
Rising awareness about sleeping disorders advanced technologies might provide with several growth opportunities forecasted year.
However, various side effects sleep aids medication patent expiration hinder growth market.
global sleeping aids market segmented basis product sleep disorder.
sleeping aids market segmented product mattresses pillows, sleep laboratories, medication (prescription based drugs, herbal drugs, drugs), sleep apnea devices others.
Further, market segmented sleep disorder insomnia, sleep apnea, restless legs syndrome, narcolepsy, sleep walking, other sleep disorders.
Based geography, global sleeping aids market segmented into North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Rest World (RoW) North America further bifurcated U.S., Canada, Mexico whereas Europe segment consist Germany, France, Italy, others.
Asia-Pacific segmented into India, China, Japan, South Korea, others while bifurcated into South America, Middle East, Africa.
Major companies operating global Sleeping Aids market Natus Medical Incorporated, Teva Pharmaceutical Industries Limited, Takeda Pharmaceutical Company Limited, Merck Co., Sanofi, GlaxoSmithKline Plc., Serta International, CareFusion Corporation, Pfizer, Compumedics Limited, among others.
Profile major players operating Global Sleeping Aids Market will provided, with detailed study their financials, product services, developments business strategies.
